case_title: MATTHEW MURPHY ET AL VS. LAUREN TRACEY SAADIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED DEC-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAADIA, LAUREN TRACEY

DEFENDANT LAUREN TRACEY-SAADIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MEGHAN TRACEY IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT MEGHAN TRACEY. DEFENDANT MEGHAN TRACEY WAIVED SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
